---
title: "George Collins"
---

## George Collins

**Dates:** (b.1839/40)

### Description

brother of Bessie Collins

### Biography

The Collins family seem to have consisted of Martha (Andrews) Collins (b. 1805/6), postmistress, wife of George Collins, (b. 1818/9) of the Post Office, Otterbourne, groom and gardener, and their children George (b. 1839/40),  Charles (b.1840/1), Elizabeth (b. 1844/5),  and Anne (b. 1846/7).

### Letters

- Letter from January 15, 1853.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
